items.content_html: The PHP Elements Sorter is a Neovim plugin that automatically sorts various PHP elements within a buffer, such as namespace uses, traits, constants, and properties. It can also remove unused imports and add spacing between elements with different visibility modifiers.
items.title: RicardoRamirezR/php-elements-sorter.nvim: The PHP Elements Sorter is a Neovim plugin that automatically sorts various PHP  elements within a buffer, such as namespace uses, traits, constants, and  properties. It can also remove unused imports and add spacing between  elements with different visibility modifiers.
